- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	Requirements provided: simple black and white login page using Vite

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	Ran npx create-vite@latest . --template vanilla, installed dependencies, started dev server

- [x] Customize the Project
	Modified main.js to create login form, updated style.css for black and white theme, added form styles

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	None required

- [x] Compile the Project
	Dependencies installed via npm, project compiled

- [x] Create and Run Task
	Dev server started automatically

- [x] Launch the Project
	Dev server running at http://localhost:5173/

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	README.md created, copilot-instructions.md cleaned up
